grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites HB 5.14.1 for lease terms and HB 5.5.1-5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states to check Part 2 for actual lender requirements and provides specific examples from Part 2

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Correctly identifies 4-year enforcement period for building regulations and 10-year time bar for planning breaches

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Specifically mentions indemnity insurance as possible resolution for building regulations issue

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Response is thoroughly grounded in Handbook structure and specific provisions rather than generic conveyancing advice
